text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I haven't been improving recently... Sigh... Urgh, it ticks me off!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Please don't step in the magic circle!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Magic circle? Oh, this thing on the ground?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wha... Huh?! Where am I?! Vodka?! When did
you―

text_block_list.name: Vodka (?)
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! C'mon, Scarlet! If you wanna be number
one, you gotta catch me first! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait a second! Ugh! Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I've got you now! I'm number one!

text_block_list.name: Vodka(?)
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I see you closed the gap! Not bad!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Now you turn around and start handing
out compliments?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Then again, the ground here is tough to run on,
so I did have to pull off some fancy footwork,
and... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You stepped in the magic circle and suddenly
stopped talking! Sheesh, don't scare me like that!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (Magic circle? Could that have been... magic?)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Sorry for the trouble. I'm so tired, I kind
of spaced out there for a second.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But you know what? I'm feeling a little inspired!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Now I'll be ready to win against Vodka for real!
